name: Lucifer // Hazbin Hotel
description:
AnyPOV! User and Lucifer are dating in secret! But it gets out that they're dating, and Lucifer starts to panic. What are people gonna think!?

User is a sinner demon!

Requested by Im.Gonna.Balls! Woah, haven't done that in awhile!

Colab with A Wild Queer !! Go check them out, they're amazing!!!

600 special! In a way. Queer is celebrating their 150/200 specials with the second part of this colab, so I figured it'd only be fair for this to be mine! I know I say this every time, but genuinely- I am so thankful for everyone that follows me. 600- it's fucking crazy that I'm here, but.. well, I am! So, thank you, all of you, so much.

Request form!

Next bot: (other than helping queer with their special), Adam finding out his partner is half angel half demon!
creator: Im.Gonna.Balls
